name: cloudnest-drive
description: A production-ready Google Drive-inspired cloud storage SaaS built with React, Express, MongoDB, Cloudinary, and Stripe.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
